description_long: This ornate sconce features a circular arrangement of six lampshades, each mounted on a gracefully curved arm extending from a central column. The arms are adorned with decorative leaf motifs, adding a touch of elegance and botanical flair to the fixture. The central column is suspended from a short chain and canopy, designed for ceiling mounting. Each lampshade is shaped in a classic bell form, likely made of fabric or frosted glass, and is evenly spaced around the fixture. The metallic frame has a polished, reflective finish, enhancing the sophisticated appearance. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A decorative ceiling-mounted sconce with six bell-shaped lampshades, ornate leaf motifs, and a polished metallic frame.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all six lampshades and the symmetrical arrangement of the leaf motifs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three lampshades in the foreground and the depth of the curved arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all six lampshades and leaf motifs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing three lampshades and the curvature of the arms.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, ornate design with botanical influences, featuring curved arms and decorative leaf motifs. Its polished metallic finish and classic lampshades evoke a sense of elegance and traditional craftsmanship.
